name: Buckeye Pecan-Butternut Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the butternut squash at 350°F until soft.
2. Peel, seed, puree, and measure out 1½ cups of the squash.
3. Whisk together all Part One ingredients until the sugar dissolves.
4. Pour into an unbaked 10-inch pie shell brushed with egg white.
5. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.
6. While baking, whisk together all Part Two ingredients except pecans.
7. When the butternut filling is set, sprinkle evenly with pecan pieces.
8. Gently pour the second filling over the nuts.
9. Return pie to oven and bake at 325°F for 40–45 minutes, or until just set.
10. Cool to room temperature and serve with lightly sweetened whipped cream.
